title: Ulti-Chem Plus Chemical Glove
shortDescription: Premium protection against chemicals, mechanical, contact heat and micro-organism hazards. High performance Polyethylene, glass fibre, spandex. Triple coated, lightweight nitrile glove with a micro foam finish
